title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account and notification preferences
language_hint: AI-generated reports and teacher communications will be automatically translated to your preferred language.

notification_items.newReport_desc: Get notified when a new report is ready for {{firstName}}
notification_items.teacherReply_desc: Notification when {{teacher}} replies to your messages
notification_items.weeklyDigest_desc: A summary of {{firstName}}'s week sent every Friday
notification_items.aiActivities_desc: When new home learning activities are generated for {{firstName}}

privacy_text: Your data is secure. EduTrack AI only uses {{firstName}}'s educational data to generate personalised learning recommendations. All data is stored securely and is never shared with third parties. AI responses are reviewed by {{teacher}} before being sent to you.
